# Vote for peer 1 in term a, then engage and release.
vote from=1 term=a lm=a0
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: none

# Engage at a5.
engage term=a lm=a5
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a5, engaged)

# Idempotent engage.
engage term=a lm=a5
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a5, engaged)

# Release at a10.
release term=a lm=a10
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a10, released)

# Idempotent release.
release term=a lm=a10
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a10, released)

# Re-engage must be at strictly greater log mark (replay protection).
engage term=a lm=a10
----
rejected
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a10, released)

# Re-engage at a15: succeeds.
engage term=a lm=a15
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a15, engaged)

# Stale release at a10: rejected.
release term=a lm=a10
----
rejected
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a15, engaged)

# Release at a15 (same as current hi): succeeds.
release term=a lm=a15
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a15, released)

# Re-engage at a20 in same term: succeeds (a20 > a15).
engage term=a lm=a20
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a20, engaged)

# Release again.
release term=a lm=a20
----
ok
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: (a20, released)

# Stale term engage (from an old term) is rejected.
# Bump to term b first, then try engaging at term a.
set
term=b voted-for=1
----
vote:  (b, 1)
acked: none

engage term=a lm=a25
----
rejected
vote:  (b, 1)
acked: none

# Wrong term release: rejected.
set
term=b voted-for=1 hi=b5 engaged=true
----
vote:  (b, 1)
acked: (b5, engaged)

release term=a lm=a20
----
rejected
vote:  (b, 1)
acked: (b5, engaged)

# Engage from higher term bumps term (maybeBumpTerm).
set
term=a voted-for=1
----
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: none

engage term=b lm=b1
----
ok
vote:  (b, -)
acked: (b1, engaged)

# Release from higher term also bumps term.
set
term=a voted-for=1
----
vote:  (a, 1)
acked: none

release term=b lm=b1
----
ok
vote:  (b, -)
acked: (b1, released)

# Refuse to engage for old log terms (Hi must be in current term).
set
term=b voted-for=1
----
vote:  (b, 1)
acked: none

engage term=b lm=a5
----
rejected
vote:  (b, 1)
acked: none
